chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6262 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.26850/2020 2. For hearing of main case 27.02.2025 Mr. Bilal Ahmed Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khalid Mehmood Siddiqui, advocate for respondent Mr. Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector SAPT Sardar Zafar Hussain advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent which is taken on record. Statement filed on behalf of respondents No.2 & 3, taken on record. In view of the foregoing learned counsel for the petitioner states that petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. The presence of the officer present in court is dispensed with. Judge Judge Amjad
